title: OG RENURE - Behandeling met AN uit mestverwerking als kunstmest in aardappel, maïs en wintertarwe
description: The report evaluates ammonium nitrate recovered from animal manure processing as a replacement for synthetic fertilizers in potatoes, maize, and winter wheat across multiple on-farm field trials. It compares crop yields, nitrogen balances, and soil nitrate residues to conventional fertilization methods and examines practical application strategies.
